abilities.name: Multitype
abilities.effect: Arceus LV.X's type is the same type as its previous Level.

attacks.name: Psychic Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard a Lightning Energy and a Psychic Energy attached to Arceus.

abilities.name: Level-Down
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon LV.X. Remove the Level-Up card from that Pokémon and have your opponent shuffle that card into his or her deck. This power can't be used if Gengar is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Compound Pain
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon that already has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Double Fall
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Salamence LV.X from your hand onto your Active Salamence, you may use this power. For each of your opponent's Pokémon that is Knocked Out by damage from Salamence's attacks this turn, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Steam Blast
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Salamence.

abilities.name: Healing Growth
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, remove 4 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Tangrowth is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Big Growth
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for as many Grass Energy cards as you like and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like.

description: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.

attacks.name: Prize Count
attacks.effect: If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, this attack does 20 damage plus 60 more damage.

name: Arceus

description: It is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world.

attacks.name: Leaf Refresh
attacks.effect: Remove 3 damage counters from each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Arceus

description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

attacks.name: Bright Flame
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard 2 Energy attached to Arceus.

name: Arceus

description: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.

attacks.name: Fastwave
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Arceus

description: It is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world.

attacks.name: Ripple Swell
attacks.effect: If you have 6 Arceus in play and each of them is a different type, search your deck for up to 6 basic Energy cards. Attach each of those Energy cards to a different Pokémon you have in play. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sky Spear
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Remove all Energy cards attached to Arceus and put them in the Lost Zone.

name: Arceus

description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

attacks.name: Lightning Turn
attacks.effect: Switch Arceus with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Arceus

description: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.

attacks.name: Mind Bend
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Arceus

description: It is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world.

attacks.name: Break Ground
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Arceus

description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

attacks.name: Metal Barrier
attacks.effect: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Arceus by Pokémon LV.X during your opponent's next turn.

name: Arceus

description: Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.

abilities.name: Star Barrier
abilities.effect: As long as Bagon has any Energy attached to it, Bagon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Dragon Rage
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Bagon

description: As a newborn, it can barely stand. However, through galloping, its legs are made tougher and faster.

abilities.name: Star Barrier
abilities.effect: As long as Ponyta has any Energy attached to it, Ponyta has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Blue Fire
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy attached to Ponyta.

name: Ponyta

description: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

abilities.name: Star Barrier
abilities.effect: As long as Shinx has any Energy attached to it, Shinx has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Payback
attacks.effect: If your opponent has only 1 Prize card left, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Shinx
